name: X-Golf Mason
about: X-Golf Mason is an indoor golf simulator venue offering high-tech simulation experiences with a full-service bar and food menu. The facility utilizes advanced camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide accurate ball and club tracking across eight state-of-the-art simulators. Pricing operates on a per-bay, hourly basis with tiered rates for weekdays and weekends, alongside multiple membership options ranging from $100 to $1,000 per month. It caters to casual players, serious golfers, and groups looking for entertainment, training, or event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: 8 state-of-the-art golf simulators with unparalleled accuracy
Full bar and food menu available on-site
Flexible booking system with walk-ins welcome
Variety of membership tiers for frequent players
Option to host private events and corporate gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with 'tasty bites' and 'XGM Signature Bites' available
Full bar serving spirits, draft beer, tap beer, and local beers

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary system with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available for $15 per set, or you can bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue has a full bar and kitchen on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about 1 hour per player to complete 18 holes, so adjust booking time based on group size.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome, and junior golf lessons are available.
